title: first_scene_start
body:
<<place bedroom>>
{{mc,default}} Oh no! Oh no! I'm late!
{{mc,default}} What do I do?
[[A. Go to school without breakfast.|guy_collision_intro]]
[[B. Go to school with a rushed breakfast.|girl_collision_intro]]

title: girl_collision_intro
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
{{girl,default}} The MC quickly gathers her things in her arms in a rush and runs to school. The MC lives in a dorm near her school so it shouldn't take her too long to get to class right? It's now just one last corner to her class.
<<shake heavy>>
{{girl,default}} SFX: BAAM!
{{girl,speaking}} Aahh!
{{girl,speaking}} Her things fall to the floor, scattering everywhere.
{{girl,speaking}} Sorry, are you okay?
{{girl,speaking}} I'm fine but my things fell everywhere.
{{girl,speaking}} Let me help you pick them up.
{{girl,speaking}} They quickly gather her papers and notebooks scattered everywhere.
{{girl,speaking}} Which class are you in? I'll help you bring these to your room.
{{girl,speaking}} Oh no, it's okay. I'm in room 468 you might be too late for your own class.
{{girl,speaking}} 468? We're classmates! Let's go quick, our teacher is very strict on tardiness.
{{girl,speaking}} They climb the stairs as fast as they can.
{{girl,speaking}} Unfortunately they were still late for their class.
[[Continue to the teacher.|girl_teacher_scene]]

title: girl_teacher_scene
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
{{girl,default}} The teacher didn't even let us explain. Tsk.
<<shake medium>>
{{teacher,default}} WHY WERE YOU LATE?
<<shake medium>>
{{teacher,default}} DO YOU EVEN KNOW WHAT TIME IS IT?
<<shake medium>>
{{teacher,default}} YOU ARE 10 MINUTES LATE!
<<shake medium>>
{{teacher,default}} GO STAND OUTSIDE THE CLASSROOM!
{{girl,speaking}} That's fine, I did end up oversleeping.
[[Continue to the end.|end_game]]

title: guy_collision_intro
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
{{guy,default}} The MC quickly gathers his things in his arms in a rush and runs to school. The MC lives in a dorm near his school so it shouldn't take him too long to get to class right? It's now just one last corner to his class.
<<shake heavy>>
{{guy,default}} SFX: BAAM!
{{guy,speaking}} Aahh!
{{guy,speaking}} His things fall to the floor, scattering everywhere.
{{guy,speaking}} Sorry, are you okay?
{{guy,speaking}} I'm fine but my things fell everywhere.
{{guy,speaking}} Let me help you pick them up.
{{guy,speaking}} They quickly gather his papers and notebooks scattered everywhere.
{{guy,speaking}} Which class are you in? I'll help you bring these to your room.
{{guy,speaking}} Oh no, it's okay. I'm in room 468 you might be too late for your own class.
{{guy,speaking}} 468? We're classmates! Let's go quick, our teacher is very strict on tardiness.
{{guy,speaking}} They climb the stairs as fast as they can.
{{guy,speaking}} Unfortunately they were still late for their class.
[[Continue to the teacher.|guy_teacher_scene]]

body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
{{guy,default}} The teacher didn't even let us explain. Tsk.
<<shake medium>>
{{teacher,default}} WHY WERE YOU LATE?
<<shake medium>>

title: end_game
body:
<<place terminal>>
{{narrator,default}} The End
[[Restart and Change Gender|restart_gender]]
